overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through the industrial Monte Diablo district. The character navigates crosswalks and narrow sidewalks beneath massive industrial structures, elevated walkways, and power lines in a sunlit dystopian urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial intersection with large storage tank

events.description: green sports car drives past from right to left across the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across the Monte Diablo crosswalk toward the large industrial tank structure

notable_agents.action: green sports car driving past the crosswalk

entered.detail: green street sign with white text reading 'Monte Diablo' mounted on a pole
massive cylindrical concrete tank with red base and graffiti art on the side
rusted metal staircase and walkway structure attached to the tank
dense network of electrical cables and wires crossing above the street

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at a sunlit industrial intersection with a massive cylindrical tank dominating the view ahead. The character crosses the asphalt crosswalk while a green sports car passes by on the right. Overhead power lines crisscross the blue sky above the Monte Diablo street sign.

events.description: character turns left around the corner of the cylindrical tank structure

agents.ego_description: walking along the sidewalk beside the tank wall, passing a pedestrian, then turning left around the corner

notable_agents.action: male pedestrian in brown coat and beanie walking in the opposite direction

entered.detail: tall concrete wall with weathered surface running alongside the sidewalk
large industrial pipe running vertically along the tank structure

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the concrete sidewalk beside the massive tank wall, passing a pedestrian in a brown coat. The camera turns left around the corner of the tank, revealing a narrow passage with industrial pipes and concrete walls replacing the open intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow industrial walkway with barrier walls

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the narrow sidewalk next to a high concrete barrier wall with industrial pipes overhead

entered.detail: high concrete block wall with industrial pipes running along the top
massive cylindrical industrial pipe running horizontally above the wall
large industrial truck parked along the opposite side of the street
low-rise industrial building with small windows and metal doors

segments.scene_description: The character proceeds along a narrow industrial walkway enclosed by a high concrete barrier wall on the right with large overhead pipes. Parked trucks and utility buildings line the left side of the street while the path continues straight through the industrial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: industrial street with elevated crane and graffiti

events.description: passing under the large yellow industrial crane structure casting shadows on the street

agents.ego_description: walking along the street passing under elevated industrial structures and approaching other pedestrians in the distance

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking ahead on the sidewalk in the same direction

entered.detail: large yellow steel crane structure spanning across the street overhead
concrete wall covered in red and green graffiti including 'CORPORATIONS MUST DIE'
tall digital screen displaying animated advertisements on the building facade
elevated railway structure with metal trusses running parallel to the street

segments.scene_description: The character walks beneath a massive yellow industrial crane structure that casts geometric shadows across the street. The walls feature prominent anti-corporation graffiti while digital billboards flicker on the left. The path opens slightly as the character approaches distant pedestrians walking ahead under the elevated train tracks.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a wide, sunlit industrial intersection into the claustrophobic corridors of the Monte Diablo district. It begins with the character crossing an asphalt street beneath a blue sky and crisscrossing power lines, passing a green sports car as a massive cylindrical tank looms ahead. As the character moves along the concrete sidewalk, the camera turns around the corner of the tank, shifting the environment from an open intersection to a narrow passage enclosed by industrial pipes and concrete walls. The scene then proceeds along a restricted walkway lined with parked trucks and utility buildings before passing beneath a massive yellow crane that casts geometric shadows over graffiti-covered walls. Finally, the path opens slightly as the camera follows the character toward distant pedestrians walking under the shadow of elevated train tracks.
